sections.label: THINKING
sections.content: The block moved RIGHT. Looking at the image, the block is now further to the right in the maze. Let me check the current position and continue navigating towards the white cross.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
ascii = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')

# Check block position
print("=== Block position ===")
for i in range(20, 50):
    for j, ch in enumerate(ascii[i]):
        if ch in 'Ob':
            print(f"  {ch} at row {i}, col {j}")
            break

# Check white cross
print("\n=== White cross ===")
for i in range(44, 54):
    for j, ch in enumerate(ascii[i]):
        if ch in 'Ww':
            print(f"  {ch} at row {i}, col {j}")

# Check the maze layout
print("\n=== Area around block ===")
for i in range(25, 50):
    row = ascii[i][38:58]
    print(f"{i}: {row}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
